description_long: This bollard features a tall, rectangular form with a series of staggered, block-like protrusions along one face, giving it a modern, geometric appearance. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with sharp, clean edges and a uniform gray coloration. The top is flat and level, while the base is slightly offset, creating a subtle step at the bottom. The sides and back are plain and uninterrupted, emphasizing the contrast with the more complex front face. Its solid, monolithic construction suggests it is made from concrete or a similar heavy material, designed to serve as a robust barrier in urban environments. The absence of any visible openings, connectors, or decorative elements reinforces its utilitarian function.
description: A tall, rectangular bollard with staggered block-like protrusions on one face and a smooth, flat top, finished in uniform gray.
description_view_0: The front view shows the staggered, block-like protrusions running vertically along the face, creating a stepped pattern.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, flat surface with a slight offset at the base, lacking any protrusions.
description_view_2: The back view is entirely flat and featureless, emphasizing the bollard's solid, monolithic form.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a flat surface with the stepped base visible at the bottom.
